59:22.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ۖ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
59:22.english: He is Allah — there is no god but He, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed. He is the Most Merciful, the Continuously Merciful.
59:22.score_notes: Short, iconic, contains إِلَٰه at the heart. Student memorises this one phrase.

lesson_use.heading: ⭐ · 1 Anchor Phrase
lesson_use.arabic: هُوَ اللَّهُ الَّذِي لَا **إِلَٰهَ** إِلَّا هُوَ
lesson_use.english: He is Allah — there is no **god** but He
lesson_use.notes: This is the phrase to carry with you. Six words that contain the entire message of tawḥīd.
